about.title: About Us
about.description1: PT Intiboga Pangan Jaya is an integrated supply service company providing high-quality ingredients for the food, beverage, and snack manufacturing industries in Indonesia.
about.description2: Based in Bandung, West Java, the company is committed to supporting manufacturers with reliable, consistent, and safe raw materials that meet modern production standards.
about.qualityStatement: The company applies standardized processing systems and strict quality control to ensure every product meets premium quality requirements.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To become a leading and trusted integrated food ingredient supplier in Indonesia and the ASEAN region, providing reliable, consistent, and innovative solutions for the food, beverage, and snack manufacturing industries.

mission.title: Mission
items: Providing safe, premium, and consistent food ingredients supported by strict quality standards and reliable supply chains.
Becoming a dependable partner for manufacturers by offering competitive pricing, responsive service, and comprehensive ingredient solutions.
Continuously expanding and improving the product portfolio to meet evolving market needs and support clients' R&D processes.
Maintaining strong, transparent, and mutually beneficial relationships with clients, suppliers, and stakeholders.
Ensuring ethical business practices, operational excellence, and commitment to delivering value in every aspect of service.

productDetail.title: Our Products
productDetail.subtitle: High-quality ingredients for your manufacturing needs
productDetail.applicationsSubtitle: Versatile ingredients for diverse manufacturing needs

potatoFlakes.title: Potato Flakes
potatoFlakes.description: Premium potato flakes made from carefully selected potatoes and processed using advanced, hygienic technology. Designed for ease of use, long shelf life, and consistent results.
applications: Thickening agent for soups, sauces, and gravies
Coating and breading for frozen foods
Fast food preparations (mashed potato, coating blends)

glucoseSyrup.title: Glucose Syrup
glucoseSyrup.description: High-quality liquid sweetener with DE 45.9, providing balance between mild sweetness, texture stability, and heat resistance.
features: Suitable for confectionery, bakery, beverage, dairy, and snack applications

margarineCream.title: Margarine Cream
margarineCream.description: A versatile ingredient for bakery, pastry, and snack industries, providing a smooth, creamy texture with excellent stability.
features: Suitable for spreading and filling applications
Ideal for use in both sweet and savory baked goods
Stable at high temperatures for production consistency

workProcess.title: Our Work Process
workProcess.subtitle: Ensuring quality control and supply stability from sourcing to delivery

step1.title: 1. Quality Sourcing
step1.desc: Rigorous selection of premium agricultural raw materials with strict supplier vetting.

step2.title: 2. Lab Testing & QA
step2.desc: Testing of physical and chemical parameters in the lab to issue Certificate of Analysis (CoA).

step3.title: 3. Safe Logistical Supply
step3.desc: Climate-controlled storage and archipelago-wide B2B shipping with scheduled delivery guarantees.
